feed.title: Johannesson Lab
feed.subtitle: The lab group of professor Hanna Johannesson at Stockholm University

entry.title: Summer-celebration at The Royal Swedish Academy of Sciences

link.title: Summer-celebration at The Royal Swedish Academy of Sciences

entry.content: Per and Anbar joined lunch and social activities to celebrate the arrival of the summer, together with the other staff at the Academy.
entry.summary: Per and Anbar joined lunch and social activities to celebrate the arrival of the summer, together with the other staff at the Academy.

entry.title: Johannesson lab at Blodomloppet 2026
entry.content: Markus, Shalya, Per, Matilde, and Jesper participated in Blodomloppet 2026. The running weather was beautiful and we had a pleasant, but exhausted, picnic after finishing the race.
entry.summary: Markus, Shalya, Per, Matilde, and Jesper participated in Blodomloppet 2026. The running weather was beautiful and we had a pleasant, but exhausted, picnic after finishing the race.

entry.title: Visit by Sara Landvik from Novonesis

link.title: Visit by Sara Landvik from Novonesis

entry.content: Sara Landvik visited us and gave a talk here at DEEP about her mycology journey and role as a fungal & enzyme hunter at Novonesis and the development of Biosolutions for a more sustainable world. She also talked about her hobby of writing a Fantasy book inspired by biology, and met up with members of the group for individual chats. Thanks for a great day!
entry.summary: Sara Landvik visited us and gave a talk here at DEEP about her mycology journey and role as a fungal & enzyme hunter at Novonesis and the development of Biosolutions for a more sustainable world. She also talked about her hobby of writing a Fantasy book inspired by biology, and met up with members of the group for individual chats. Thanks for a great day!

entry.title: Markus presents at the Pint of Science

link.title: Markus presents at the Pint of Science

entry.content: Markus presented the germline work at the popular scientific event Pint of Science at Pitchers bar in Uppsala. The event coincided with a game by the local football team Sirius and the bar was packed, so plenty of football fans got to hear about mushrooms!
entry.summary: Markus presented the germline work at the popular scientific event Pint of Science at Pitchers bar in Uppsala. The event coincided with a game by the local football team Sirius and the bar was packed, so plenty of football fans got to hear about mushrooms!

entry.title: Johan and Gulnara leave the lab

link.title: Johan and Gulnara leave the lab

entry.content: We had pizza and beer to say farewell to Johan and Gulnara, who are both leaving the lab for new adventures. We will keep working on projects together, in particular as we are lucky to have Gulnara in the house as the newly recruited SciLifeLab-fellow at DEEP.
entry.summary: We had pizza and beer to say farewell to Johan and Gulnara, who are both leaving the lab for new adventures. We will keep working on projects together, in particular as we are lucky to have Gulnara in the house as the newly recruited SciLifeLab-fellow at DEEP.

entry.title: A Humongous Fungus workshop
entry.content: Our group went to Uppsala to meet up with old colleagues, and we exchanged talks on what is going on in the different research groups around Uppsala-Stockholm. We ended the day with a nice potluck at EBC in Uppsala.
entry.summary: Our group went to Uppsala to meet up with old colleagues, and we exchanged talks on what is going on in the different research groups around Uppsala-Stockholm. We ended the day with a nice potluck at EBC in Uppsala.

entry.title: The yearly feast of the Swedish Royal Academy of Sciences

link.title: The yearly feast of the Swedish Royal Academy of Sciences

entry.content: Hanna, Anbar and Per went to Stockholm City Hall. A great event with interesting talks, fantastic music and food. All to the honor of science!
entry.summary: Hanna, Anbar and Per went to Stockholm City Hall. A great event with interesting talks, fantastic music and food. All to the honor of science!

entry.title: Hanna participates in Ingvar Lindqvistdagen 2026 at KVA

link.title: Hanna participates in Ingvar Lindqvistdagen 2026 at KVA

entry.content: Hanna joined the teachers-symposium, got to see fantastic lectures from price-winners in teaching, and gave a talk on researching on fungi.
entry.summary: Hanna joined the teachers-symposium, got to see fantastic lectures from price-winners in teaching, and gave a talk on researching on fungi.

entry.title: Boel and Peter Jan at Asilomar

link.title: Boel and Peter Jan at Asilomar

entry.content: Peter Jan and Boel went to the 33rd Fungal Genetics Conference at Asilomar, California. They presented posters and Boel won the poster price! Congratulations, Boel!
entry.summary: Peter Jan and Boel went to the 33rd Fungal Genetics Conference at Asilomar, California. They presented posters and Boel won the poster price! Congratulations, Boel!

entry.title: Gulnara at the EMBL Symposium
entry.content: Gulnara went and participated in the EMBL Symposium “The cellular mechanics of symbiosis: sensing friend from foe” in Heidelberg, Germany. She gave a talk about her lichen work, and learn about great diversity of symbioses across the tree of life and different ways of studying them.
entry.summary: Gulnara went and participated in the EMBL Symposium “The cellular mechanics of symbiosis: sensing friend from foe” in Heidelberg, Germany. She gave a talk about her lichen work, and learn about great diversity of symbioses across the tree of life and different ways of studying them.
